title: Security Features Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on GitHub project security tools.

questions.question: Regarding GitHub, what is 'Dependabot' used for?
options: To automatically scan for and potentially upgrade project dependencies for security vulnerabilities

questions.question: Which of these is a key benefit of using GitHub's Secret Scanning feature?
options: It automatically scans your repository for accidentally committed secrets like API keys or database passwords
It makes your code build faster
It deletes old commits by mistake
Its only possible for SQL repositories

questions.question: Regarding the security features, how automatically can Dependabot contribute to your repository?
options: By creating pull requests to upgrade vulnerable dependencies
